meanings.definition: force a person or an animal into a position from which he cannot escape

examples: this lot should be treed so that the house will be shaded in summer

meanings.definition: chase an animal up a tree
examples: the hunters treed the bear with dogs and killed it
her dog likes to tree squirrels

meanings.definition: forced to turn and face attackers
examples: she had me cornered between the porch and her car
